UCLA_R.Description: UCLA Loneliness Scale (Revised) score, measuring perceived loneliness.

LSAS.Description: Liebowitz Social Anxiety Scale score, assessing social anxiety.

CESD.Description: Center for Epidemiologic Studies Depression Scale score, measuring depressive symptoms.

ERQ_CR.Description: Emotion Regulation Questionnaire Cognitive Reappraisal score, assessing cognitive reappraisal tendencies.

Set_Shifting_Cost.Description: Cost of set shifting, measuring cognitive flexibility.

CERQ_OS.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Self-blame subscale score.

CERQ_A.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Acceptance subscale score.

CERQ_R.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Rumination subscale score.

CERQ_PU.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Positive refocusing subscale score.

CERQ_KP.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Refocus on planning subscale score.

CERQ_PP.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Positive reappraisal subscale score.

CERQ_SP.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Putting into perspective subscale score.

CERQ_K.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Catastrophizing subscale score.

CERQ_OI.Description: Cognitive Emotion Regulation Questionnaire - Other-blame subscale score.

SNS.Description: Social Network Scale - Measure of objective social isolation
